dialogues: Here's the first thing to check: What's your BIGGEST number? That tells you what scales might work.
Right. 80 is the biggest. Always check the biggest number first. Does it fit on the scale without too many lines on the axis?
You saw that Scale of 5 needed 17 tick marks. Scale of 10 only needs 9. For big data, bigger scales make cleaner graphs.
When more than one scale fits, pick the one that's easier to read.
